name: legacy-blade-mcp
description: DD-333 Phase A.6 fixture — valid entry with tools[] array but tools omit the granularity block. Granularity is optional at pack-spec 3.x (additive); the AJV gate MUST accept this. The S-MCP-001 lint in stallari-secops-scanner fires a `.warning` against this shape, but the catalog build itself is green.
author: stallari

tools.name: list_things
tools.description: Tool without a granularity declaration — assembler infers worst-case.
